class.name: GDKDisplayTimeoutDeferral
class.brief_description: Owner of a single PC GDK display timeout deferral handle.
class.description: Returned by [method GDKDisplay.acquire_timeout_deferral]. Holding a [GDKDisplayTimeoutDeferral] prevents the system from idling the display until [method release] is called or the wrapper is freed. The handle is closed via [code]XDisplayCloseTimeoutDeferralHandle[/code], which is independent of the GDK runtime lifecycle so [method release] is always safe even after [method GDK.shutdown].

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] while this wrapper still owns an open deferral handle.

method.name: release
method.description: Closes the deferral handle. Idempotent; calling [method release] more than once is safe.
